author: @jubilee
body:
We started a podcast! Listen to a follow-up conversation with one of the Flat Earthers in this first episode: 👉https://anchor.fm/radicalempathy 👈 - leave us a voice message after listening!

After many requests, we're happy to share this episode of Middle Ground with you all! In this episode, we explore belief, science, and how our experiences shape our worldview. We'd love to hear your thoughts!

body: I used to think this whole "flat earth" thing is just one of those Internet jokes where trolls are pretending that earth is flat, you would think this joke is only staying on Internet. Until I came to know that there are people out there who actually believe that earth is flat and conduct conferences for it from time to time. What's worse is these people even bring their children into these places and brainwashing their mind since childhood.
